feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Applications Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Applications Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting Error while opening solution in PRD
entry.content:
Getting Error while opening solution in PRD

Severe error while opening a solution: System.UnauthorizedAccessException: Access to the path "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Professional\Common7\IDE\PRD\YCNYMYHJY_BC\" is denied.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Studio 2508 installation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently experiencing a challenge with SAP Cloud Application Studio 2508 (Pilot) installation to extend SAP Business ByDesign.

Following the instructions provided in the SAP Help Portal (link below), we completed the installation:

SAP Help On Application Studio 

However, when attempting to log in, we receive the error message:

“SAP Cloud Applications Studio (Pilot) is not enabled in this system. For more information, click Help.”

 

 

 

This occurs despite having followed all the steps outlined for the 2508 release, including:

Installing Visual Studio 2022 (Enterprise or Professional).

Downloading and installing the VSIX Extension from the SAP Software Download Center (to enable SAP Cloud Extension in Visual Studio 2022).

Downloading and installing SAP Cloud Application Studio 2508 (Pilot).

As part of our troubleshooting, we also uninstalled older versions of SAP Cloud Application Studio and any previously installed Visual Studio instances, but the issue persists.

Could you kindly advise on the next steps to resolve this?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: ByDesign, PDI custom business object email template
entry.content:
Dear Community!

Could someone give me an advice in ByDesign email templates?

I have an issue with email sending. Its ok to manage custom BO email sending, and also HTML template usage, BUT

There is the form template management option in ByD, where i can add email template for forms. I have my custom form there, and i can add an email template, but how can i use it from there? It will be an easier way to develop email sending for our custom BO, because i dont need a technical BO where i manage the email template (even the customer can add new template is this case).

So i want to read the attached email template at form templates, is there any way to get this?

 

Thank you,

András

entry.title: PDI - Production Solution is not loading in "Visual Studio 2022" version
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing a sever issue - PDI - Production Solution is not loading in Solution Explorer in "Visual Studio 2022" version. PFA. But Solution is loading successfully in DEV and TEST environments. Issue with PRODUCTION TENANT only.

 

Please do the needful at the earliest.

 

Rgs,

Chandra

entry.title: OBN navigation to check user access rights
entry.content:
Long shot as I know not many people are using this now - but - 

In C4C / PDI / SDK I have an EC on a standard screen I want to control visibility of it via an OBN as suggested here - using $controller.CheckNavigationTarget('OBNNavigationOutport') in a script to see if the user has the required permission to the target of the OBN.

I created an OBN to the QC of a custom object, however the above script always returns 'true', even if the user hasn't got the required WCView assigned for the custom object that the OBN targets.  Also I've tried adding a button to the EC that calls the OBN, and it will take me to the QC even if the user shouldn't have permission.  Is there some extra step I'm missing?

entry.title: Adding Tab to Material Master, SAP BY DESIGN.
entry.content: I am trying to add a tab to my Material Master screen to show Quality information. I have gotten the Tab it self added but I am stumped on where to go next as far as adding the information into the tab. If anyone has any kind of helpful documentation or advice it would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Data migration from SAP C4C to ZOHO CRM system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can anyone guide me on, how we can migrate SAP C4C data to ZOHO CRM system? I want to know the process of data migration and different ways to transfer data from C4C to ZOHO CRM system. Can we transfer data manual or API or by using other functionality of C4C? If we can transfer it Manual then what are the process to ger this task successful?

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Operators available in Regular Expressions (RegEx) in ABSL - hexadecimal values
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to validate certain text fields by checking whether they contain any non-UTF-8 characters. For this purpose, we would like to use the built-in .FindRegex function for strings in ABSL. 

However, to achieve this, we need to reference the allowed characters by their hexadecimal values. Normally, this is done using escape tokens such as as \x or \u. For example, the following RegEx works correctly in standard implementations (see www.regex101.com😞

[^\x{0000}-\x{c5be}]

Unfortunately, this expression does not seem to be interpreted correctly by ABSL. It appears that ABSL can interpret escape tokens to some extent — for instance, the following RegEx works as expected:

[^\\x00-\\x99]

(The first backslash escapes the second one so that ABSL interprets it correctly.)

However, this pattern is limited to single-byte values only (from 00 fo FF) and we need to include all UTF-8 characters, which requires two-byte tokens such as the one in the earlier example.

I'm seeking general technical background information about the RegEx flavour used in C4C. Specifically, if it is based on PCRE2, because then it should support both \x63 and \x{0063} syntaxes. However, only the former seems to be recognized, which suggests either a different underlying standard is being used or there is an explicit limitation in functionality.

Could you please provide documentation or guidance on which operators are supported in ABSL for use in the .FindRegEx function?

Thank you and best regards,
Marek

entry.title: Error "Native class not defined" generated when deploying the SAP SSAM2505
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to deploy SAP Service and Asset Manager 2505. The initial deployment was successful however, after scanning the application QR code, the App Update fails when the user selects “Update” in the popup

We found the related SAP KBA for this issue: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003665935 
.

After following the steps mentioned in the note we encountered a new error during deployment. I have attached a screenshot for your reference.

 

How can I resolve this issue? Could you please provide some insights or suggestions on this?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: External API call from CAP project in BAS
entry.content:
Hi All ,

i am trying to call external API in CAP project "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"

i am getting  response but no data 

{"@odata.context":"$metadata#A_BusinessPartner","value":[]}".

Service.cds

using { API_BUSINESS_PARTNER as abp } from './external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.csn';

service BusinessService {  
    entity A_BusinessPartner as projection on abp.A_BusinessPartner {
        key BusinessPartner, Customer, BusinessPartnerFullName, BusinessPartnerGrouping, BusinessPartnerUUID, OrganizationBPName1     }
}

Service.js

const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.service.impl( async function() {
    const bp = await cds.connect.to('API_BUSINESS_PARTNER');    
    this.on('READ', 'A_BusinessPartner', async req => {        
        return bp.run(req.query);       
    });
})

package.json

{
  "name": "new",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "dependencies": {
    "@cap-js/hana": "^2",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity": "^4.1.2",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "^4.1.2",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "^4.1.2",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/util": "^4.1.2",
    "@sap/cds": "^9",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^2",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^9"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "private": true,
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
        "kind": "odata-v2",
        "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER",
        "credentials": {
          "url": "https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER",
          "headers": {
            "APIKey": "xBKJfJi0dg1AdpCGLYv88WVdFEEy78GP"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

 Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Problem with access to new SAP Cloud Application Studio in C4C
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working at C4C developing in Visual Studio 2022. As you know, since August of this year, what we knew as SAP Cloud Application Studio has become an extension within the Visual Studio program.

Now we've run into a problem: when SAP updates the development environments, we have a two-week window before the production environment is updated, and we don't have access to it, not even to view the code.

This problem arises because previously we had SAP Cloud Application Studio with both versions installed on our PCs, and we could access whichever one we wanted. Now we have to uninstall the extension with the old version and install the new version.

Does anyone have a solution to access the production environment during these two weeks?

My possible solutions are to set up a virtual machine on my PC with the older version or use a different PC.

entry.title: Cannot activate the 'flp-editor-vscode' extension because it depends on an unknown ....
entry.content:
Hi!

I've a SAP Business Application Studio  Trial account in order to practice.

I have created Full Stack Cloud Application space,
Recently I noticed in storyboard Graphical modeler is not working.
I got an error - "Cannot activate the 'flp-editor-vscode' extension because it depends on an unknown 'SAP.vscode-watt-framework-extension' extension."

npm - 10.9.2
node - v22.13.1

Could you please help me?

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: Install cloud application studio(SDK) requires MS visual studio 2022 version
entry.content:
As per the below link to install SDK after August 2025, you will be required to download Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (Professional or Enterprise edition) to continue using the Studio. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/d5278bebf6…

But when we are going to purchase MS visual studio then 2022 version is not offering. It's showing only Latest version 2026, seems that will not work for SDK. 

Please suggest how to purchase and which version to purchase?

Need help to purchase the link of Microsoft Visual Studio 2022.

entry.title: Unable to update Alternative Employee ID field via Cloud Applications Studio HCM024
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to update the Alternative Employee ID field for PartyIdentifierType HCM024 via Cloud Applications Studio.

(Employee extension BO)

I have reviewed notes

2593215 - Alternate Employee ID Field not Present in the Personnel Administration Data Migration Template

2035626 - Howto Migrate "Alternative Employee ID" for Employee Data

Both are related to migration template, whereas we want to do this regularly.

I can see that the node Identification is not available for Public Access, but the BusinessPartnerID field is.

The entry highlighted is added when manually assigning a value to 

Is there a reason why we can't add that?

Example code:

Hope someone might be able to help.

Additional info..

Best Regards

Jay

entry.title: SAP solution was not opened completely Error in SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In SAP Busiess ByDesign's SDK, I opened the solution CSS and tried to assemble and download it.
At that time, I got the following error.
"The solution was not opened completely. Please refresh the solution."

I also tried to refresh the solution but I got the same error.

Can someone guide me how to do this?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Studio - UI Designer - Checkmate error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm modifying an event handler. After I add List row - Operation1 and activate the screen, it shows the error.

I have no idea what this error is.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Has anyone got this error before?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: how use MDRO.SendLogViaEmail function sap c4c absl
entry.content:
Hello team,

I would like to request support regarding the usage of the function MDRO.SendLogViaEmail.

Currently, I have a job that runs on a monthly basis, and there is a requirement to send a log once the execution is completed. For this purpose, I am calling the mentioned function at the end of the process through a script.

script

However, although the execution completes without any apparent errors, the email is not being received.

Could you please advise if there is any additional configuration required or if I might be using the function incorrectly?

I remain available to provide further details if needed.

Thank you.

@HorstSchaude

entry.title: change key fields in custom BO in SAP C4C V1 after transported to other system
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a custom BO as follows

import AP.Common.GDT as apCommonGDT;

businessobject CBO {

        // Root node must not be specified, it is created implicitly
        //
        // Add elements here. 
        // 
        // To declare an element as alternative key, use the [AlternativeKey] annotation.
        // Please note:
        // - An alternative key of type UUID exists implicitly for each node, enabling the node
        //   to be used as an association target.
        // - The QueryByElements query is created automatically for each node.
        // - Code completion is available with CTRL + SPACE.
		
   [Label("field1")] [AlternativeKey] element SerialNumber : ID ;
   [Label ("field2")]  [AlternativeKey] element field2 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description;
   [Label ("field3")]    element field3 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description;
   [Label ("field4")]   element field4 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description; 
   
   }

This CBO is transported to various tenants. I want to change the CBO as follows in which I need to change the annotation for one of the fields and make it as non alternativekey. Does this need a deletion patch? Is this allowed using the regular patch movement. 

import AP.Common.GDT as apCommonGDT;

businessobject CBO {

        // Root node must not be specified, it is created implicitly
        //
        // Add elements here. 
        // 
        // To declare an element as alternative key, use the [AlternativeKey] annotation.
        // Please note:
        // - An alternative key of type UUID exists implicitly for each node, enabling the node
        //   to be used as an association target.
        // - The QueryByElements query is created automatically for each node.
        // - Code completion is available with CTRL + SPACE.
		
   [Label("field1")] [AlternativeKey] element SerialNumber : ID ;
   [Label ("field2")]  element field2 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description;
   [Label ("field3")]    element field3 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description;
   [Label ("field4")]   element field4 :LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description; 
   
   }

  Let me know if anyone has encountered this situation before.

Best Regards

Gauri Nargunde

entry.title: Cross Deployment Unit Issue – Cross-DU Issue: Auto Create ServiceRequest on Prospect Creation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement in SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) and need guidance on the correct architectural approach.

Business Requirement:

When a Prospect (Customer – standard BO) is created and the Role Code is BUP002, a ServiceRequest (standard BO) should be created automatically. The ServiceRequest must have a specific Processing Type, a predefined Subject (e.g., “Verification Ticket”), and should be linked to the Prospect.

System Landscape:

Customer BO (standard) belongs to the Foundation Deployment Unit.

ServiceRequest BO (standard) belongs to the Service/CRM Deployment Unit.

Problem:

When I try to use ServiceRequest.Create() inside Customer.xbo (AfterModify), I receive the error:

"Access of member 'Create' in a cross-deployment unit is not possible."

Since both are standard BOs in different Deployment Units, direct creation is not allowed.

My Questions:

If both objects are standard BOs, can IC (Integration Component) be used directly between them?

For this scenario, how many Custom BOs are required?

Is one Custom BO in the Service DU enough (as a bridge)?

Or are two Custom BOs required (one in each DU)?

If using a Custom BO in Service DU, how can it be triggered when a Prospect is created in Customer BO, considering cross-DU restrictions still apply?

What is the SAP-recommended best practice for this type of cross-deployment requirement? Should this be implemented using:

Custom BO bridge pattern

Workflow rules

Web Service / OData

Or another approach?

I would like to follow a clean and SAP-compliant design without violating cross-deployment restrictions.

Any guidance on the correct architecture would be appreciated.

Thank you.

C4C Service  C4C Service  SAP CRM, GWI client plug-in SAP Cloud Applications Studio

entry.title: Change default value for delivery priority for new stock transfer order
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am currently working in SAP Business ByDesign using the Cloud Application Studio. A customer has requested that we change the default value of the Delivery Priority field when creating a Stock Transfer Order.

The issue is that I cannot locate this field in the CustomerRequirement BO, which is what I initially expected to use. I have checked the available nodes and elements in the BO, but there is no reference to a Delivery Priority or related enhancement option.
Questions / Clarifications Needed

- Is CustomerRequirement the correct Business Object for Stock Transfer Orders in this context?
If not, which BO actually exposes the Delivery Priority field for Stock Transfer Orders?
- Is there any standard configuration in ByDesign that controls the default Delivery Priority for internal stock transfers that we should adjust instead of using a PDI enhancement?
- If the field is part of a UI-only structure, is there a recommended extension approach (UI scripting, event handler, validation script, etc.)?
